info.title: Swings API
info.description: Swings public + admin HTTP API. Mutating endpoints are annotated; GETs are still fully callable but not listed here (see FDN-02 scope).

200.description: Subscription scheduled to cancel at period end

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Base template id (read for key/channel/locale lookup)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle state. Omit to return every row.

post.summary: Public ingest for SPA analytics (optional Bearer links session to logged-in user).

200.description: Reset email dispatched if account exists

get.summary: Resolve the active banner config + category list + current policy version.
get.description:
Always returns 200 with the `default`/`en` seed if no better match exists.
The only error shape is a `503` if the tables are empty (which can only
happen if migration `024_consent.sql` has not run).

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Regulatory region override (EU, UK, US-CA, …). Usually omitted — server resolves from request headers.

400.description: Invalid action or missing subject identifier

post.summary:
POST /api/csp-report — accept a browser violation report, log it, and
return 204 No Content. Never exposes internal state or reflects the body.

get.summary: FORM-10: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country list for the chained dropdown.

FORM-10: ISO 3166-2 state / province list for the supplied alpha-2
country. Returns an empty array for uncovered countries — the
renderer falls back to a free-text input in that case.

404.description: Form not found or has no published version

post.summary: FORM-08: mint a Stripe PaymentIntent for a payment / donation field.
post.description:
Required header: `Idempotency-Key` (UUID-ish opaque token). Replays
short-circuit at the DB lookup before we ever round-trip Stripe.

422.description: Validation failed; response body carries per-field errors

200.description: Subscription scheduled to cancel at period end

requestBody.description: Resend webhook JSON payload (email.sent, email.delivered, email.bounced, email.complained, email.opened, email.clicked, email.delivery_delayed)

version.description:
Banner config row version. Bumped when copy/layout changes; used by
CONSENT-03 to re-prompt subjects whose recorded consent predates this.

theme.description: Opaque theme overrides; the frontend maps known keys to PE7 CSS vars.

BogoConfig.description:
Configuration for a "buy N, get M free" promotion.

The engine groups cart lines matching `applies_to_product_ids` (empty = any
product), totals their quantity, and emits `floor(total / (buy + get)) * get`
free units, evaluated at the cheapest matching unit price so the customer's
"free" units come off the least-expensive line first. That rule mirrors
WooCommerce's default BOGO behaviour and avoids the abuse of stacking a
high-priced free unit onto a low-priced purchase.

BundleItem.description:
`bundle_items` row. `quantity` is always positive (CHECK-enforced).
`child_variant_id` is optional; when set, the bundle includes that specific
variant, otherwise it includes the default/any variant of the child product.

BundleItemInput.description: Admin-only payload for a single bundle component.

ConsentCategoryDef.description:
Single-category entry in the banner response.

Wire fields are camelCased to match the frontend stub at
`src/lib/api/consent.ts`; when schema codegen replaces the stub the
Svelte components consume this shape unchanged.

key.description:
Stable key — MUST NOT be renamed after a row has been written to the
consent log (CONSENT-03). Migration-level change only.

required.description: When true, toggle is disabled in the preferences modal.

defaultEnabled.description:
Whether the category is pre-checked before the user interacts.
GDPR Art. 4(11) + EDPB 05/2020 §86: non-required categories MUST default
to `false`. Derived here rather than stored so a data fix is cheap.

action.description:
One of `granted` / `denied` / `updated` / `revoked` / `expired` /
`prefill`. Enforced at the DB CHECK level; validated here for a
friendlier 400.

categories.description:
Map of category key → granted bool. Must include every category the
current banner version exposes.

services.description:
Optional per-service overrides (when the subject used the advanced
picker). Empty object is fine.

anonymousId.description:
Browser-generated anonymous id (UUID cookie). Used when the subject
is not signed in so the audit log can still be linked across sessions.

bannerVersion.description:
Optional banner / policy version overrides — defaults come from the
authoritative banner config when omitted. Kept as options so the
client can send them when it already has a cached banner copy.

ConsentRecordRow.description:
Serialized row shape — shared across `POST /record` response and
`GET /me` listings.

CouponEngineView.description:
Row shape covering the EC-11 fields plus the legacy `is_active` flag so
the response mirrors the admin's view after mutation.

CouponScope.description: Discount scope — where on the cart the discount applies.

CreateAssetRequest.description: Admin-only payload for adding a downloadable asset.

CreateProductRequest.description:
Admin-only payload for `POST /api/admin/products`. `product_type` + `slug`
are mandatory; everything else is optional on create and can be updated
later.

CreateVariantRequest.description: Admin-only payload for creating a variant.

DownloadableAsset.description:
`downloadable_assets` row. `storage_key` is the R2 object key; EC-07 will
wire signed-URL issuance against it. `access_policy` gates who can request
a fresh signed URL.

DsarFulfillResponse.description:
Admin fulfill response. When the DSAR is `access` / `portability` and the
admin did not provide a URL, the exported JSON is inlined in `export` so
the caller can pipe it to a download without a second round-trip.

DsarRow.description: Row shape returned from the admin list + the subject submission response.

FormDefinition.description: Payload of `GET /api/forms/{slug}` — the shape FORM-10's renderer hydrates.

schema.description: Active version's `schema_json` — a JSON array of `FieldSchema` variants.

logic.description: Active version's `logic_json` — a JSON array of `LogicRule`.

reason.description:
Optional free-text reason captured in the audit log + the `users`
row (truncated to 512 chars by the DB CHECK constraint).

categories.description: Flattened category → granted map, derived from the most recent record.

decidedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC. `None` if the subject has no recorded decisions yet.

NotificationPreference.description:
A (user, category, channel) preference row as stored in
`notification_preferences`.

OutboxRowDto.description:
Paginated outbox row. Kept in sync with [`OutboxRecord`] but serialises the
status as a lowercase string for frontend friendliness.

OutboxStatus.description:
Lifecycle states for an outbox row. Mirrors the `CHECK` constraint in
`019_outbox.sql`.

PaginatedOutboxResponse.description:
OpenAPI wrapper so the snapshot carries a concrete `PaginatedResponse<OutboxRowDto>`
schema without bleeding the generic into `ApiDoc`.

resume_token.description:
Optional: extend an existing resume token in place. When set + the
token is valid, the existing row is updated and the same token is
returned; otherwise a fresh token is minted.

current_step.description:
Zero-based page-break index the draft was on when saved. Lets the
renderer jump straight back to the right step on resume.

field_key.description: FieldSchema `key` of the payment field on the form.

amount_cents.description:
Donor-supplied amount for `payment_kind = donation`. Ignored for
fixed-amount one-time payments — the schema's `amount_cents` wins.

email.description: Donor email — receipts are sent to this address.

resume_token.description:
Optional resume token if the field is on a draft (so we can
later cross-link `form_payment_intents.partial_id`).

PreferenceUpdate.description: Input shape for the bulk set endpoint. Missing timezone defaults to UTC.

Product.description:
`products` row. Money fields are `BIGINT` cents; translate via
[`crate::common::money::Money::cents`] when arithmetic is needed.

ProductDetail.description:
Bundle of a product + its first-class children. Returned by `GET
/api/admin/products/{id}` and `GET /api/products/{slug}` so the admin UI
and the public PDP both receive a single hydrated document.

ProductStatus.description:
Publication lifecycle. `draft` is the default on insert; only `published`
rows surface through the public router. `archived` is terminal and hides
the product from every lookup except admin list views.

ProductType.description:
Top-level product archetype. Matches the CHECK constraint in
`migrations/040_products.sql`.

ProductVariant.description:
`product_variants` row. A variant overrides product pricing when
`price_cents` is set; otherwise it inherits.

RecurringMode.description: Subscription billing applicability for a coupon.

RenderedTemplate.description:
Output of [`Template::render`]. Kept narrow so channels do not have to
re-parse Tera output.

utm.description: Optional UTM block captured from the query-string at render time.

files.description:
Optional file descriptors from FORM-05. Shape `[{ field_key, file_id,
filename, size, sha256, mime_type }]`.

anonymous_id.description:
Optional anonymous id cookie — the frontend generates one for
unauthenticated sessions so repeat submissions tie back together.

Template.description:
A concrete template row loaded from `notification_templates`.

`body_compiled` is maintained by the admin API at save time (currently a
straight copy of `body_source` until MJML compilation lands in FDN-09);
rendering reads `body_compiled` so the hot path never re-parses MJML.

UpdateCouponEngineRequest.description:
Admin-only payload for `PUT /api/admin/coupons/{id}/engine`. Every field
is optional; `None` means "leave the existing value alone". Pass an empty
array to clear an includes/excludes list.

discount_value_cents.description:
Flat discount value in minor units (cents). Setting both this and
`discount_percent_bps` is accepted but only one takes effect — the
engine prefers the cents field.

discount_percent_bps.description: Percentage discount in basis points (`10_000 bps = 100%`).

UpdateProductRequest.description:
Admin-only payload for `PUT /api/admin/products/{id}`. Every field is
optional — `None` means "leave the existing value alone" (COALESCE in the
repo layer). `product_type` is deliberately not update-able because
changing it post-creation would invalidate variant + asset + bundle rows.

UpdateVariantRequest.description: Admin-only payload for updating a variant.

suspended_at.description:
ADM-02: lifecycle state surfaced to the admin members UI. `None`
for each timestamp means the account is not in that state.

ValidationError.description:
Structured validation failure. Stable `code` strings are the shared contract
with `src/lib/forms/validate.ts`.

tags.name: consent
tags.description: Cookie / tracking consent banner + category lookup

tags.name: admin-security
tags.description: Admin-only privileged member-lifecycle and security console (suspend, ban, sessions, audit log)
